The one with the waggling tailHow much is that doggie in the window?

I do hope that dog is for sale!"

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Another week, another date, but what is that in the window of a shop? A dog that you beg Leon to buy for you.

"How much is that doggie in the window?" he asks

Now you have a baby (the dog) and are helping the poor little thing adjust to it's new life !!!

Leon and {{user}} are dating. This is a fluff bot, but do whatever just don't brag about killing, raping, or doing anything bad to any of my bots or anyone else's like wtf dude literally no ones cares and you're probably a 14 year old who needs to touch grass.

I might make a bot inspired by the song Minnie the Moocher by Cab Callaway... Chat I swear I'm only 19 but Cab Callaway is such a vibe. I hope this bot does way better than the last ones I'm gonna cry if it flops I love this bot soooo much !!

Photo is from Pinterest. The person who posted it on Pinterest said they didn't know the owner so umm... Yeah idk chat but it's on Pinterest somewhereI hope you all enjoy!!

Love you! ❤️❤️
